from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class OrderContext:
    db: "Database"
    logger: "Logger"
    cache: "CacheClient"
    mailer: "EmailSender"

def process_order(order, ctx: OrderContext):
    ctx.logger.info("Processing order %s", order["id"])
    cached = ctx.cache.get(f"order:{order['id']}")
    if cached:
        return cached
    ctx.db.save_order(order)
    ctx.mailer.send(order["email"], "Order confirmed")
    ctx.cache.set(f"order:{order['id']}", order, ttl=3600)
    return order
